Anou's Theory of Change: Artisan Led

"The Anou Cooperative offers a fresh 
        alternative to traditional cultural clichés – and 
        a challenge to vested market interests."

"By building a language-free interface, Anou is helping impoverished 
        artisans run their own businesses and upend the world of Fair Trade."

"Anou helps rural artisans cut out middlemen. The Anou site addresses 
        the technological hurdle of posting to the web  — but that’s just the first step in a 
        much bigger process of becoming actual business owners.”

"The Anou connects Moroccan artisans directly with consumers for fair trade textiles and 
        crafts. I've lusted after their rugs all year."

"…because Anou allows you to interface directly with artisans, I was able to special order the specific rug I wanted. 
        After I placed the order, I got periodic updates (with photos!) on its progress. I love our new rug!"
©2023 The Anou Cooperative | Owned and Managed by Morocco's Artisan Community
